Description: 24-hour Pilot Flying J travel center on I-65 at Exit 2 (US-31W / Nashville Road), just north of the Tennessee line in Franklin (Simpson County). Amenities include diesel and DEF lanes, showers, a certified CAT Scale, restaurant/QSR, convenience store, ATM, propane, laundry/lounge, RV parking and premium Wi-Fi. Directories list roughly 170+ truck parking spaces.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Flying J Travel Center #661
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Flying J Travel Center #661, I-65 Exit 2 (Nashville Road), Franklin. Provides guaranteed-accurate certified weights for commercial trucks.

24-hour independent truck stop on I-65 at Exit 2 (Nashville Road), Franklin. Directories list about 79 truck parking spaces, 6 fuel lanes and 3 showers, plus diesel, fast food, deli, convenience store, ATM, dump station and Wi-Fi.

24-hour Pilot travel center on I-65 at Exit 6 (KY-100 / Scottsville Road), Franklin. Amenities include diesel and DEF lanes, showers, a certified CAT Scale, QSR/food, convenience store, ATM and Wi-Fi. Directories list roughly 150 truck parking spaces (plus reservable prime spots) and 9 showers.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #438
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #438, I-65 Exit 6 (Scottsville Road), Franklin. Provides guaranteed-accurate certified weights for commercial trucks.

24-hour AMBEST / Shell-branded travel center on I-65 at Exit 6 (KY-100 / Scottsville Road), Franklin (formerly listed as Bluegrass Truck Plaza). Directories list about 92 truck parking spaces, 6 fuel lanes and 4 showers, plus bulk DEF, convenience store, fast food, laundry, truckers lounge, certified scales, trailer drop, on-site truck/trailer wash and truck repairs.

Speedco (Love's) truck lube, preventive-maintenance and tire shop on I-65 at Exit 6 (Scottsville Road), Franklin. Services include fast oil/lube PM service, DOT inspections and commercial tire sales/service for Class 8 trucks. Standalone service facility co-located near the Exit 6 truck-stop cluster.
TravelCenters of America (TA) standalone truck service shop on I-65 at Exit 6 (Scottsville Road), Franklin. Provides commercial truck tire sales/service and mechanical/diesel repair. Facility #0347.

Commercial truck and trailer wash on I-65 at Exit 6 (Scottsville Road), Franklin, on the Pilot #438 lot. Services include tractor wash, trailer wash/washout, engine wash, undercarriage rinse, inside-frame wash and degrease. Standalone wash operator co-located with the truck stop.

Business Name: Best One Fleet Service - Bowling Green
Description: Commercial truck tire dealer and fleet service center in Bowling Green serving the I-65 freight corridor. 78,000 sq ft facility with 10 service bays, TIA-certified technicians, commercial tire sales/service, brakes, alignments, suspension and trailer repair, plus 24-hour roadside assistance.
Ziegler Tire commercial location in Bowling Green serving the I-65 corridor. Commercial truck/OTR tire sales, retreading, fleet inspections and maintenance, with 24/7 roadside assistance.
Days Inn by Wyndham hotel on I-65 at Exit 6 (Scottsville Road), Franklin, offering free on-site truck/RV parking (directories list roughly 5-18 truck spaces on the south side of the property).
Ramada by Wyndham hotel on I-65 at Exit 22 (US-231 / Scottsville Road), Bowling Green, offering free RV/bus/truck parking for guests.

Business Name: Kentucky Weigh Station - I-65 Northbound (Simpson County)
Description: Permanent Kentucky commercial-vehicle weigh/inspection station on northbound I-65 in Simpson County near Franklin, between Exit 2 (Nashville Road) and Exit 6 (Scottsville Road), just north of the Tennessee state line. Operated by Kentucky State Police Commercial Vehicle Enforcement (KSP CVE).

Business Name: Simpson County (Franklin) Welcome Center - I-65 Northbound
Description: Kentucky Welcome Center on northbound I-65 in Simpson County just north of the Tennessee line, near Franklin. New facility opened October 2025 (replacing the demolished 1974 center). Provides restrooms, vending and commercial truck parking (roughly 20 truck spaces) with high-mast lighting.

Business Name: All Star Towing & Road Service (at Sudden Service #62)
Description: 24-hour towing and roadside truck-repair operator co-located at Sudden Service #62 Travel Center, I-65 Exit 6, Franklin. Listed services include towing, tire service, DOT inspections, mechanical repair and welding.

TravelCenters of America (TA #468) travel center at I-65 Exit 38 in Smiths Grove. 24-hour truck stop with diesel, convenience store, Chester's Chicken and a full-service restaurant, showers, laundry, certified CAT Scale, and 100+ truck parking spaces. Formerly branded Smiths Grove Travel Center (Exxon/BP); now operating as TA.
Certified CAT Scale located at the TA Smiths Grove travel center, I-65 Exit 38.

Independent Shell/IGA Express truck stop at I-65 Exit 48 in Park City (Mammoth Cave area). Open 24 hours with gas and diesel, Subway, deli/restaurant, travel store, ATM, propane, and about 15 truck parking spaces.

Service center / Chevron at I-65 Exit 53 in Cave City offering flatbed and wrecker towing, flat/tire repair, engine and lube service, and off-road (dyed) diesel. Associated Higdon's Wrecker Service provides 24/7 towing.

24/7 heavy-duty towing and truck repair at I-65 Exit 53 in Cave City serving Horse Cave, Glasgow, Munfordville and the surrounding area. Services include HD towing/recovery, mobile mechanic, HD tire changes, load shifts/transfers, and equipment hauling.

Business Name: Red Roof Inn & Suites Cave City
Description: Budget hotel at I-65 Exit 53 in Cave City (Mammoth Cave area) with free semi-truck and bus parking, 24-hour front desk, and free parking. Reviewers specifically note ample 18-wheeler parking.

Love's Travel Stop #360 at I-65 Exit 58 in Horse Cave. 24-hour truck stop with diesel, DEF lanes, McDonald's and Subway, private showers, laundry, certified CAT Scale, dog park, RV hookups/dump station, propane, and truck parking. Co-located Love's Truck Care tire/service center.
Certified CAT Scale #1174 at the Love's Travel Stop #360, I-65 Exit 58 in Horse Cave.

Love's Truck Care center co-located at Love's Travel Stop #360, I-65 Exit 58 in Horse Cave. Full-service truck care: commercial tire sales and repair (Bridgestone, Michelin, Goodyear, Yokohama, Love's Retread; Lionshead tires), light mechanical service, oil changes, Interstate Batteries, and emergency roadside assistance.

Bookable truck & trailer parking off I-65 Exit 65 in Munfordville, on the CTS/CB-shop lot on Main St. 24/7 access; approximately 6 spaces bookable daily/weekly/monthly via Truck Parking Club. On-site CB shop; dining and Walgreens nearby.

KYTC rest area on I-65 Northbound near mile marker 59 (Hart County, between Horse Cave and Munfordville). Separate truck and passenger parking (100+ well-lit spaces), restrooms, picnic area, vending. Repeat winner of Kentucky's Best Maintained Rest Area award.
KYTC rest area on I-65 Southbound near mile marker 60 (Hart County, between Munfordville and Horse Cave). Separate truck and passenger parking, restrooms, picnic area, vending.
Baymont by Wyndham hotel at I-65 Exit 53 in Cave City advertising free RV/bus/truck (large-vehicle) parking.

Full-service Petro Stopping Center (TravelCenters of America brand, #330) at I-65 Exit 86 (KY-222, Glendale), Hardin County. Reported: 12 diesel lanes, 263 truck parking spaces, on-site CAT Scale, TA Truck Service (Petro:Lube, ~5 service bays), Iron Skillet restaurant, showers, laundry, bulk DEF, ATM. Open 24 hours. Adjacent to a standalone Blue Beacon Truck Wash.
CAT Scale certified truck scale co-located at the Petro Stopping Center #330, I-65 Exit 86 (Glendale). One weigh per ticket, reweigh free at same location.

TA Truck Service commercial repair shop (Petro:Lube) co-located at Petro Stopping Center #330, I-65 Exit 86 (Glendale). Approx. 5 service bays; road service, oil/lube, DOT inspections, brake/alignment, HVAC and electrical service, tire repair.

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Glendale
Description: Standalone Blue Beacon Truck Wash, a double-bay facility at I-65 Exit 86 next to the Petro Stopping Center (Petro Travel Plaza), Glendale. Services: truck/trailer exterior wash, trailer washouts, engine wash.

Pilot Travel Center #48 at I-65 Exit 86 (KY-222, Glendale), Hardin County. Reported: 11 diesel lanes, 11 bulk DEF lanes, 125 truck parking spaces, 8 showers, on-site CAT Scale, Wingfoot Truck Care (Goodyear commercial tire/service), McDonald's, laundry, ATM. Open 24 hours.
CAT Scale certified truck scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #48, I-65 Exit 86 (Glendale).
Wingfoot Truck Care (Goodyear commercial tire & truck service) co-located at Pilot Travel Center #48, I-65 Exit 86 (Glendale). Commercial tire sales/repair and truck service.

RaceTrac travel center #2597 (RaceTrac's first Kentucky location) near I-65 Exit 91 (US-31W / Dixie Ave, at the Western Kentucky Parkway junction), Elizabethtown. Reported: 6 high-flow diesel lanes, 28 truck parking spaces, reefer plug-ins, bulk DEF, deli, RV parking, lighted paved lot. Open 24 hours.
Reported CAT Scale / truck scale at RaceTrac #2597, near I-65 Exit 91 (Elizabethtown).

Love's Travel Stop #716 (opened March 2018) at 601 S Ring Road, Elizabethtown, at the I-65 / Western Kentucky Parkway junction (signed WK Parkway Exit 133; immediately adjacent to I-65 in the Elizabethtown freight hub). Reported: 8 diesel lanes, 63 truck parking spaces, 5 showers, on-site CAT Scale (certified scales), Love's Truck Care (3 service bays), Arby's, laundry, bulk DEF, dump station, game room. Open 24 hours.
CAT Scale (certified truck scale) co-located at Love's Travel Stop #716, Elizabethtown, at the I-65 / WK Parkway junction.
Love's Truck Care shop (approx. 3 service bays) co-located at Love's Travel Stop #716, Elizabethtown. Commercial tire sales/repair, oil change and PM services, light mechanical/road service.

Plaza 94, a small independent fuel/travel plaza at I-65 Exit 94 (US-62 / N Mulberry St), Elizabethtown. Reported: diesel, approx. 5 truck parking spaces, deli/restaurant, ATM, and an on-site truck wash.
Truck wash service reported on-site at Plaza 94, I-65 Exit 94, Elizabethtown.

Greenfield Inn & Suites (formerly Wingfield Inn & Suites) off I-65 Exit 94 (US-62), Elizabethtown. Offers free self parking with free RV, bus, and truck parking; 24-hour front desk, free breakfast, indoor pool.

Business Name: Best Western Plus Elizabethtown Inn & Suites (I-65 Exit 94)
Description: Best Western Plus Elizabethtown Inn & Suites off I-65 Exit 94 (US-62 / N Mulberry St), Elizabethtown. 92 rooms; free parking with outside uncovered parking that accommodates buses, boats and large vehicles (truck parking); free hot breakfast, indoor saltwater pool, fitness center.

Business Name: Kentucky Weigh Station - I-65 Southbound (Elizabethtown, KSP Post 3)
Description: Permanent Kentucky state weigh/inspection station on I-65 Southbound near Elizabethtown, Hardin County (KSP Post 3 area), located between I-65 Exit 105 (to the north) and Exit 86 Glendale (to the south). Fixed scale with NORPASS/PrePass bypass capability.

24-hour Pilot Travel Center at I-65 Exit 105 (KY-61) in Lebanon Junction, Bullitt County. Diesel (8 diesel lanes), showers, convenience store, Subway and McDonald's, CAT Scale on site, DEF, laundry, game room, and truck service bays. Reported truck-space count varies by source, so left blank pending confirmation.

Business Name: CAT Scale - Pilot Travel Center #399, Lebanon Junction
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Pilot Travel Center #399 at I-65 Exit 105 (KY-61), Lebanon Junction, Bullitt County.

24-hour Love's Travel Stop #238 at I-65 Exit 116 (KY-480/Blue Lick-Cedar Grove Rd) in Shepherdsville, Bullitt County. Diesel, showers, convenience store, Subway and Chester's, CAT Scale, DEF, EV charging, and a co-located Love's Truck Care service center (listed separately). Reported truck-space count varies by source (88 vs 120), so left blank pending confirmation.

Business Name: CAT Scale - Love's Travel Stop #238, Shepherdsville
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Love's Travel Stop #238 at I-65 Exit 116, Shepherdsville, Bullitt County.

24/7 Love's Truck Care full-service truck maintenance and tire center co-located at Love's Travel Stop #238, I-65 Exit 116, Shepherdsville. Services include oil/PM changes, light mechanical repair, new tires and mobile/roadside tire service, computer diagnostics, and trailer repair.

24-hour Pilot Travel Center #356 at I-65 Exit 116 (KY-480/E Blue Lick Rd) in Shepherdsville, Bullitt County. Diesel (7 fuel lanes), 6 showers, convenience store, Subway on site with Taco Bell and Waffle House adjacent, and a CAT Scale. Reported truck-space count varies by source (60 vs 90), so left blank pending confirmation.

Business Name: CAT Scale - Pilot Travel Center #356, Shepherdsville
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #356 at I-65 Exit 116, Shepherdsville, Bullitt County.
Standalone truck/trailer wash on Cedar Grove Rd at I-65 Exit 116 in Shepherdsville, adjacent to Love's Travel Stop #238. Semi and trailer washing.

Business Name: Bullitt County Welcome Center (I-65 Southbound, MM 114) - truck parking
Description: Kentucky (KYTC) Welcome Center / rest area on I-65 southbound at approximately mile marker 114 in Bullitt County (Shepherdsville area), with separate truck and passenger parking, restrooms, vending, and picnic area. Held pending confirmation of legal overnight truck parking status.

Reported Kentucky State Police / Commercial Vehicle Enforcement (KVE) weigh station on I-65 in the Bullitt County / Shepherdsville area. Held pending independent confirmation of exact location, direction, mile marker, and operating status.

Business Name: Days Inn by Wyndham Louisville Airport Fair & Expo Center
Description: Hotel at I-65 Exit 128 (Fern Valley Rd) in Louisville, Jefferson County, near the airport and Kentucky Expo Center. Advertises free parking for vehicles of all sizes, including truck, bus and RV parking. Genuinely serves I-65 (interchange is on I-65, not I-264).

Budget motel in the airport hotel cluster off I-65 Exit 128 (Fern Valley Rd), Louisville, Jefferson County. Some third-party booking sites report on-site truck parking, but this could not be confirmed on an official source.
